tasks.subject: Task 0: Dockerfile + GLADOS_PLUGINS_ENABLED gate
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Image ships uvx + Node 20 + plugin log directory. Engine reads `GLADOS_PLUGINS_ENABLED` (default `true`) and skips `discover_plugins` when off.

**Files:**
- Modify: Dockerfile:20-31
- Modify: glados/core/engine.py:700-715
- Create: tests/test_engine_plugin_gate.py

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- uvx + npx on PATH after image build
- /app/logs/plugins/ exists
- GLADOS_PLUGINS_ENABLED=false skips discover_plugins
- 3 new tests pass

**Verify:** `python -m pytest tests/test_engine_plugin_gate.py -v` → 3 passed

```json:metadata
{"files": ["Dockerfile", "glados/core/engine.py", "tests/test_engine_plugin_gate.py"], "verifyCommand": "python -m pytest tests/test_engine_plugin_gate.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["uvx + npx on PATH", "/app/logs/plugins exists", "flag-off skips discovery", "3 new tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Runner cache injection (uvx + npx)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `runner.py` injects `--cache-dir <plugin>/.uvx-cache` for uvx and `npm_config_cache=<plugin>/.uvx-cache` env for npx.

**Files:**
- Modify: glados/plugins/runner.py:128-148, 174-189
- Create: tests/test_plugins_runner.py

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- uvx args contain --cache-dir + path AFTER package@version token
- npx env contains npm_config_cache
- remote plugins unaffected
- 4 new tests pass

**Verify:** `python -m pytest tests/test_plugins_runner.py tests/test_plugins_loader.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["glados/plugins/runner.py", "tests/test_plugins_runner.py"], "verifyCommand": "python -m pytest tests/test_plugins_runner.py tests/test_plugins_loader.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["uvx --cache-dir injected after package@version", "npx npm_config_cache env injected", "remote unaffected", "4 new tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: MCPManager add_server / remove_server / event ring / per-plugin log
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Per-plugin task lifecycle on MCPManager + per-plugin event ring + stdio errlog routed to `/app/logs/plugins/<name>.log` with size-cap rotation.

**Files:**
- Modify: glados/mcp/manager.py:62-76, 187-244
- Create: tests/test_mcp_manager_lifecycle.py

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- add_server registers in _servers + _session_tasks; raises if duplicate
- remove_server cancels task, awaits ≤5s, drops state
- get_plugin_events returns ring contents (cap 256)
- stdio sessions write to /app/logs/plugins/<name>.log; >1 MB → .log.1
- 6 new tests pass

**Verify:** `python -m pytest tests/test_mcp_manager_lifecycle.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["glados/mcp/manager.py", "tests/test_mcp_manager_lifecycle.py"], "verifyCommand": "python -m pytest tests/test_mcp_manager_lifecycle.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["add_server / remove_server lifecycle", "event ring per plugin (cap 256)", "per-plugin log file with rotation", "6 new tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Plugin store install / remove / set_enabled / slugify
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `store.py` grows install/remove/set_enabled/slugify helpers. Atomic write via `<slug>.installing/` rename. Stub runtime.yaml is `enabled: false`.

**Files:**
- Modify: glados/plugins/store.py
- Modify: glados/plugins/__init__.py
- Create: tests/test_plugins_store.py

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- slugify last-segment lowercased, non-alphanumeric → '-', collisions -2..-100
- install_plugin atomic via .installing rename
- remove_plugin rmtrees with .. safety
- set_enabled flips runtime.yaml.enabled
- 8 new tests pass

**Verify:** `python -m pytest tests/test_plugins_store.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["glados/plugins/store.py", "glados/plugins/__init__.py", "tests/test_plugins_store.py"], "verifyCommand": "python -m pytest tests/test_plugins_store.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["slugify with collision suffix", "atomic install via staging dir", "remove with .. safety", "set_enabled round-trip", "8 new tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Core 8 /api/plugins/* endpoints
tasks.description:
**Goal:** WebUI handlers for list / detail / install / save / enable / disable / delete / logs. Install enforces https-only + SSRF + size + timeout. Save preserves '***' secret placeholders.

**Files:**
- Create: glados/webui/plugin_endpoints.py
- Modify: glados/webui/tts_ui.py:1880, 1955, end of class
- Create: tests/test_webui_plugins.py

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- 8 endpoints reachable, admin-only
- install rejects http://, RFC1918, loopback, link-local, oversize
- save with secrets={K: '***'} preserves prior secret
- enable calls add_server; disable + delete call remove_server
- 12 new tests pass

**Verify:** `python -m pytest tests/test_webui_plugins.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["glados/webui/plugin_endpoints.py", "glados/webui/tts_ui.py", "tests/test_webui_plugins.py"], "verifyCommand": "python -m pytest tests/test_webui_plugins.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["8 endpoints admin-only", "install SSRF + size guards", "secret-placeholder preserved", "hot-rotate on enable/disable", "12 new tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: ServicesConfig.plugin_indexes field
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `cfg.services.plugin_indexes: list[str]` round-trips via services.yaml with https-only validation.

**Files:**
- Modify: glados/core/config_store.py
- Create: tests/test_services_config_plugin_indexes.py

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Default empty list
- Validator rejects non-https
- Round-trip via YAML preserves the list
- 4 new tests pass

**Verify:** `python -m pytest tests/test_services_config_plugin_indexes.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["glados/core/config_store.py", "tests/test_services_config_plugin_indexes.py"], "verifyCommand": "python -m pytest tests/test_services_config_plugin_indexes.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["default empty", "https validator", "YAML round-trip", "4 new tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Browse endpoints (/api/plugins/indexes + /api/plugins/browse)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** GET/POST /api/plugins/indexes (manage URL list) + GET /api/plugins/browse (fetch + merge all configured indexes).

**Files:**
- Modify: glados/webui/plugin_endpoints.py
- Modify: glados/webui/tts_ui.py
- Modify: tests/test_webui_plugins.py

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- GET indexes returns persisted list
- POST indexes validates https-only, persists via _put_config_section
- GET browse merges by name (last-index-wins), partial on per-index failure
- Each entry tagged with source_index
- 6 new tests pass

**Verify:** `python -m pytest tests/test_webui_plugins.py -k browse -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["glados/webui/plugin_endpoints.py", "glados/webui/tts_ui.py", "tests/test_webui_plugins.py"], "verifyCommand": "python -m pytest tests/test_webui_plugins.py -k browse -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["indexes GET/POST round-trip", "browse merges multiple indexes", "partial on per-index failure", "6 new tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: WebUI panel skeleton — installed list + toggle + trash + off-state
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Plugins sub-section under System → Services with installed list, off-state, toggle, trash. Modal opening stubbed for T8.

**Files:**
- Modify: glados/webui/static/ui.js (add ~120 lines)
- Modify: glados/webui/static/style.css

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Card renders below LLM Endpoints on System → Services
- Off-state notice when enabled_globally=false
- Per-row layout: icon, name, version, category badge, status dot, toggle, gear, trash
- Toggle hot-rotates via /enable|/disable; revert on failure
- Trash → confirm dialog → DELETE
- Polls /api/plugins every 30 s while System tab visible

**Verify:** Manual UI inspection on deploy (T13).

```json:metadata
{"files": ["glados/webui/static/ui.js", "glados/webui/static/style.css"], "verifyCommand": "", "acceptanceCriteria": ["panel below LLM Endpoints", "off-state notice", "row layout matches spec", "toggle hot-rotates", "trash confirm + delete", "30s poll"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Configuration modal — Configuration tab
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Gear icon opens centered modal with three tabs (Configuration / Logs / About). Configuration tab auto-renders the form from server.json + current runtime values; saves via POST /api/plugins/<slug> with secret-placeholder preservation.

**Files:**
- Modify: glados/webui/static/ui.js (~200 lines)
- Modify: glados/webui/static/style.css

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Modal opens with backdrop, Esc + click-outside + Cancel close it
- Three tab buttons; active tab visually marked
- Three form sections: Environment vars, Headers, Arguments — only those that apply
- Typed inputs: password (secret), select (choices), url (format=url), text (other)
- Required marker, default-as-placeholder
- Save posts JSON; secrets unchanged ('***') preserve
- Save success → toast + close + refresh

**Verify:** Manual UI test on deploy (T13).

```json:metadata
{"files": ["glados/webui/static/ui.js", "glados/webui/static/style.css"], "verifyCommand": "", "acceptanceCriteria": ["modal w/ 3 tabs", "form auto-renders from manifest", "typed inputs per spec", "secret placeholder preservation", "save flow works"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Modal — Logs tab + About tab
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Logs tab (lines selector + Refresh + 5 s auto-refresh + stdio tail + event ring). About tab (metadata + Reinstall-from-source). Install flow records source URL in _meta.

**Files:**
- Modify: glados/webui/static/ui.js
- Modify: glados/webui/plugin_endpoints.py

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Logs tab: 100/500/2000 selector, Refresh, 5s auto-refresh
- Auto-refresh tears down on close / tab switch
- About tab: name, version, category, persona role, repo URL, source URL, Reinstall button
- Install flow stores source URL under _meta['com.synssins.glados/source_url']
- Reinstall = confirm → DELETE + POST install with saved URL

**Verify:** Manual UI test on deploy (T13).

```json:metadata
{"files": ["glados/webui/static/ui.js", "glados/webui/plugin_endpoints.py"], "verifyCommand": "", "acceptanceCriteria": ["logs tab w/ controls", "auto-refresh teardown", "about tab metadata", "reinstall flow", "source URL recorded in _meta"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: Add by URL card
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Card under the Plugins panel with URL + slug inputs and Install button. Slug auto-fills from URL on blur. Success → opens config modal so operator can fill values + enable.

**Files:**
- Modify: glados/webui/static/ui.js

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- URL + slug inputs + Install button rendered
- Slug auto-fills from URL on blur (slugified)
- Install button calls POST /api/plugins/install
- Success: toast + refresh + open config modal
- 4xx/5xx: inline error

**Verify:** Manual UI test on deploy (T13).

```json:metadata
{"files": ["glados/webui/static/ui.js"], "verifyCommand": "", "acceptanceCriteria": ["two inputs + install", "slug auto-fill on blur", "success opens modal", "inline error path"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 11: Browse card
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Browse card with collapsible Index URLs editor (add/remove/save) and Browse button → fetches /api/plugins/browse and renders gallery. Each gallery card has an Install button reusing the install endpoint.

**Files:**
- Modify: glados/webui/static/ui.js
- Modify: glados/webui/static/style.css

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Card renders. Index URLs section is collapsible.
- Add URL: validates https-only client-side, persists via POST /api/plugins/indexes
- Remove URL: per-row × button removes + saves
- Browse button: GET /api/plugins/browse, renders gallery
- Each gallery card: title, category badge, description, source-index footer, Install button
- Install button: POST install with entry's server_json_url + slugified name
- Empty state when no URLs configured

**Verify:** Manual UI test on deploy (T13).

```json:metadata
{"files": ["glados/webui/static/ui.js", "glados/webui/static/style.css"], "verifyCommand": "", "acceptanceCriteria": ["index URL editor add/remove/save", "browse button + gallery", "per-card install", "empty state"]}
```

- Modify: docs/CHANGES.md
- Modify: README.md

- Change 32 follows Change 31's structure

tasks.subject: Task 13: Deploy + smoke test
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Build + deploy via scripts/_local_deploy.py, verify uvx + npx in image, manually smoke-test 3 flows (install + enable remote, install + enable stdio, off-state).

**Files:** none — deploy step.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Deploy succeeds, /health green on 8015 + 8052
- which uvx + which npx return paths inside container
- Remote-plugin install + enable flow works end-to-end
- Stdio-plugin install + enable spawns subprocess (visible in `ps -ef`)
- GLADOS_PLUGINS_ENABLED=false → off-state notice + no subprocesses
- No regressions on chat / TTS / STT / HA Tier 1 + Tier 3
- SESSION_STATE.md Active Handoff updated with new image SHA

**Verify:** Operator confirms manual smoke checks pass.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["C:/src/SESSION_STATE.md"], "verifyCommand": "", "acceptanceCriteria": ["deploy + healthcheck green", "uvx + npx on PATH inside container", "remote-plugin smoke", "stdio-plugin smoke", "off-state smoke", "no regressions", "SESSION_STATE updated"]}
```
